plugins.name: cogitave-estate
plugins.description: READ surface for the Cogitave estate. Discovery + query over Cogitave Core (the typed property graph) via the cogitave-core MCP server: tiered onboarding, schema/knowledge map, hybrid docs/graph search, and ownership routing. Read-only, least-privilege; no mutation.

plugins.name: cogitave-flow
plugins.description: WRITE surface for the Cogitave estate. Governed contribution + the canonical 7-stage request lifecycle + docs-as-code, automated over the cogitave-core MCP server. Propose-only at Day 0: opens issues/PRs and stages draft Request nodes; never mutates protected state.
